prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 1646→1685→1430→1237→1253，2021–2022 年高位震荡，2023 年起明显前移（位次数字减小），2024 年达近年最低 1237 名，2025 年小幅后移至 1253 名，近两年基本稳定在 1237–1253 区间；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划：2021 年 71 人、2022 年 67 人、2023 年 40 人、2024 年 66 人、2025 年 66 人；2026 年计划64 人，较 2025 年减少 2 人，小幅缩招约 3%，对竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安交通大学为 985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学主榜 2021–2026 年连续位列第 10 名，稳居全国 Top10，属于顶尖工科强校；2026 年声誉数据中该校未出现明显负面事件；抖音热度总排名第 24 位（较热），综合热度 184 万，短视频曝光量处于中上水平；2024 年曾出现师德师风相关负面舆情，但影响已逐步消退；未见投档线断档记录；动力工程及工程热物理 A+、控制科学与工程 A+、机械工程 A+、电气工程 A+、材料科学与工程 A、计算机科学与技术 A、力学 A、工商管理 A、数学 A、管理科学与工程 A、马克思主义理论 A，A- 及以上学科达 13 个，工科实力全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等工科专业持续高热推荐，报考热度不减；辽宁省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 20 万，物理类按近年占比约 71.8% 估算约 14.36 万人，与 2025 年基本持平；省控线物理类本科批近年稳定在 360–368 分，2025 年为 367 分，无明显波动；西安交通大学位于陕西（非本省），辽宁省招生占比约 3.2%–8.5%（2025 年全校在辽招生 51 人，占比 8.5%），属跨省招生，无显著地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年稳定在 1237–1253 区间、2026 年小幅缩招 2 人（约 3%）、学校顶尖工科实力与持续高热专业热度，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次在 2025 年基准 1253 名基础上略有前移（竞争略加剧），预测最低位次约 1245 名，区间 1127–1363 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1646→1685→1430→1237→1253. There was high volatility in 2021–2022, but from 2023 onward, the ranking moved significantly forward (ranking number decreased), reaching a recent low of 1237 in 2024, and slightly moving back to 1253 in 2025. In the past two years, it has stabilized in the 1237–1253 range. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province: 71 in 2021, 67 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 66 in 2024, 66 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 64, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 3%, which slightly eases competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 10th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities from 2021 to 2026, firmly in the national Top 10, and is a top-tier engineering powerhouse. In 2026, no significant negative incidents appeared in its reputation data. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of 1.84 million, and short video exposure is at an upper-middle level. In 2024, there was negative public opinion related to teacher ethics, but its impact has gradually faded. No record of admission score line breaks has been observed. Disciplines: Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanics A, Business Administration A, Mathematics A, Management Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, with 13 disciplines rated A- or above, making its engineering strength top in the country.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science continue to be highly recommended and popular, with no decrease in application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Liaoning Province general college entrance examination is about 200,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 143,600 based on the recent proportion of about 71.8%, roughly the same as 2025. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch has been stable at 360–368 points in recent years, with 2025 at 367 points, showing no significant fluctuation. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi (not in the home province), with the enrollment proportion in Liaoning about 3.2%–8.5% (in 2025, the university enrolled 51 students in Liaoning, accounting for 8.5%), which is cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the historical rankings stabilizing in the 1237–1253 range in the past two years, a slight reduction of 2 students (about 3%) in 2026, the university's top-tier engineering strength, and sustained high popularity of majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (competition slightly intensifies) from the 2025 baseline of 1253, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1245, in the range of 1127–1363.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer Science and Technology)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Including Strong Chip Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Engineering Mechanics (National Top Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1127–1363, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1127), you can focus on stretching for top majors like Qian Xuesen Class and Smart Electrical Leading Class. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1363), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors, while also considering Tier 2 medium majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 528→578→571→623→747, showing an overall backward trend (increasing ranking numbers). In 2025, it significantly moved back by 124 places compared to 2024, reaching the highest ranking in recent years. The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for History Category: 9 students in 2021, 9 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 11 in 2024, 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 10 students, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a reduction of about 16.7%, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked 10th in the main Soft Science ranking for 6 consecutive years, with top comprehensive strength. In 2026 reputation data, no significant negative incidents were observed for this university. Douyin popularity total ranking 24th (relatively popular). In 2024, there was negative public opinion related to teacher ethics, but its impact has gradually faded. No record of cutoff line breaks. Marxist Theory is rated A (related to Liberal Arts Experimental Class). Although Law is not independently rated, the university's Law Experimental Class relies on a comprehensive university platform. Foreign Language and Literature is not independently rated.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity is divided and watchful (relatively hot but divided), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended. In 2026, Liaoning Province History Category candidates, estimated at about 28.2% of the total, are approximately 56,400, roughly the same as 2025. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 437 points, a significant increase of 37 points from 400 points in 2024, reflecting intensified overall competition. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi, not a local university, with a small enrollment number for History Category in Liaoning (10 students), showing no significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the reduction of 2 students (about 16.7%) in 2026 easing competition, and the significant increase in the provincial control line reflecting intensified overall competition, based on the 2025 benchmark of 747, the ranking is expected to move forward (easier to enter), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 652, range 576–728.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 576), you can focus on reaching for the Law Experimental Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 728), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety.
